reason: Answer 1 'Платну дорогу' (toll road). Official Ukrainian sign 5.82.1 'Платна дорога': green motorway-style sign with white toll-amount circle panel (10/25/50). Sourced from Wikimedia Commons File:UA_road_sign_5.82.1.svg (rendered PNG); pixel-matches the ПДР test reference diagram for this exact question.
